parameters.value: {'id': '010_查询订单的支付状态', 'title': '查询订单的支付状态', 'method': 'GET', 'url': '/p/order/isPay/${orderNumbers}', 'header': {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept-Language': 'zh', 'Authorization': '${token_type}${access_token}'}, 'param': None, 'assertion': {'text': 'true'}, 'presql': None, 'extract_data': None, 'assert_db': {"select status from tz_order where order_number = '${orderNumbers}'": 2, "select is_payed from tz_order where order_number = '${orderNumbers}'": 1}}
